name: Cinnamon Sledges
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 300°F. Beat butter, sugars, and egg yolk in a large mixing bowl at medium speed until light and fluffy. Combine flour, cinnamon, and salt in another bowl. Add to beaten mixture and continue beating just until blended (the dough will be stiff). Spread dough evenly in an ungreased 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 inch jelly roll pan. Beat egg white with a fork until foamy. Spread evenly on top of the dough. Sprinkle with nuts and press in lightly. Bake for 40-45 minutes. Cut into 3-inch squares while still hot, then cut across diagonally into triangles. Cool in the pan. Makes 30 servings, each containing 150 calories.
